success.description: The target's flesh ripples, twists, and boils with a painful series of (thankfully temporary) mutations. The target draws a mutation, suffers fatigue equal to its severity, and is affected by the mutation while this spell is recharging
As above, but the mutation is permanent! The target's corruption is reduced by the mutation's severity

boon.description: Add or remove 1 recharge token to any of your Tzeentch spells
You may draw 3 mutations and choose 1 to apply, instead

chaosStar.description: You draw and apply a mutation to yourself. It lasts as long as the mutation inflicted on your target

success.description: The target's flesh ripples, twists, and boils with a painful series of (thankfully temporary) mutations. The target draws a mutation, suffers fatigue equal to its severity, and is affected by the mutation while this spell is recharging
As above, but the mutation is permanent! The target's corruption is reduced by the mutation's severity

boon.description: Add or remove 1 recharge token to any of your Tzeentch spells
The target suffers stress equal to the fatigue he suffers

chaosStar.description: You draw and apply a mutation to yourself. It lasts as long as the mutation inflicted on your target
